product_overview: ColdGuard is an autonomous cold chain breach monitoring and recovery backend built with FastAPI, Firebase Realtime Database, and LLM-driven agents. It detects temperature breaches, analyzes risk, executes containment actions, and exposes live operational data through simple API endpoints.
core_goals: Detect cold chain temperature breaches in real time
Trigger an automated multi-agent containment workflow
Analyze unstructured field reports to identify breach events
Expose live sensor and shipment state through read APIs
Ensure fast, resilient breach response with minimal human intervention

features.name: System Health and Live Fleet Monitoring
features.description: Provides basic service health plus live access to sensor readings and shipment records stored in Firebase.
user_flows: GET / with no parameters -> Receive 200 health status confirming the service is online -> GET /sensors -> Receive 200 with all truck sensor readings from Firebase -> GET /shipments -> Receive 200 with shipment records and current statuses
GET / -> Receive 200 health status -> GET /sensors -> Receive 200 sensor list showing current fleet telemetry -> GET /shipments -> Receive 200 shipment list showing cargo and shipment status
GET /sensors -> Receive 200 with sensor data for all trucks -> Client requests malformed or unavailable data source -> Receive non-200 error response or empty/unavailable result from backend
GET /shipments -> Receive 200 with shipment data -> Firebase data is missing or inaccessible -> Receive error handling response or incomplete shipment list

features.name: AI Multi-Agent Breach Resolution
features.description: Simulates a temperature breach and runs the sequential 4-agent containment pipeline to assess, decide, and execute recovery actions.
user_flows: POST /trigger-breach with valid truck_id and temperature above threshold -> Receive 200 AgentPipelineTrace with sensor assessment, analysis, decision, and execution outputs -> Backend updates breach status and writes containment actions to Firebase
POST /trigger-breach with truck_id not found in Firebase -> Receive 404 Truck not found -> No containment pipeline execution occurs
POST /trigger-breach with valid truck_id but database update fails during execution -> Receive 500 Database update failed -> Incident is not fully written to Firebase

POST /trigger-breach with temperature below threshold -> Receive 200 pipeline trace indicating no active breach or normal status -> Orchestrator halts after assessment without proceeding to downstream agents

features.name: Unstructured Breach Report Analysis
features.description: Accepts free-text logistics reports, extracts truck and temperature details, and triggers the same breach response workflow as structured telemetry.
user_flows: POST /analyze-unstructured with driver report text containing truck identifier and temperature -> Receive 200 UnstructuredAnalysisResult with extracted fields and triggered breach response -> Backend forwards the parsed values into the breach pipeline

POST /analyze-unstructured with valid content but ambiguous or incomplete temperature text -> Receive 200 result with best-effort extraction or fallback parsing outcome -> If extraction is insufficient, response reflects parsing uncertainty and may not trigger a breach
POST /analyze-unstructured with empty or invalid content -> Receive error response from backend validation or parsing failure -> No breach response is triggered

POST /analyze-unstructured with content referencing an unknown truck_id -> Receive 200 analysis result or downstream error mapping -> Breach response may fail with truck-not-found handling if the parsed truck does not exist

features.name: Cold Chain Breach Monitoring API
features.description: Health checking and real-time cold chain temperature monitoring endpoints.

endpoints.description: Returns all truck sensor readings from Firebase
Returns all shipments from Firebase with current status

features.name: AI Multi-Agent Breach Resolution API
features.description: Trigger breach simulation and execute LLM orchestrator-agent containment pipeline.

endpoints.description: Simulate a sensor reading a temperature breach and execute 4-agent containment pipeline
Analyzes unstructured text report to extract truck_id and temperature and trigger breach response
